projectDescription: A .NET Framework console application that automates intercompany data synchronization across nine SAP Business One company databases via the Service Layer API, replicating master data and commercial documents in real time.
keyFeatures: Automated bidirectional synchronization of master data (items, business partners, manufacturers, payment terms, GL accounts) across 9 SAP Business One companies
Full intercompany purchase-to-sale document flow: purchase requests → sales orders (Hechizo) → purchase orders (branches)
Replication of AR invoices and AR credit notes from Hechizo as AP invoices and AP credit notes in branch companies
Incoming payment synchronization across all company pairs in both directions
Discount group, salesperson, and employee master data replication
SAP Business One Service Layer REST API integration with Basic Auth token management
INI-file-based configuration for HANA database connections and per-company credentials
File-based daily log system with structured JSON payload logging for audit trails
Error registry stored in SAP custom table @SINCROERROR for persistent failure tracking
Memory management utilities for long-running synchronization sessions
publicApiSurface: Intercompany.CrearSOCIOTODAS(string bdOrigen, string bdDestino, string TokenDestino)
Intercompany.ActualizaSOCIOTODAS(string bdOrigen, string bdDestino, string TokenDestino)
Intercompany.EnviaSapPorBasicAuth(string Metodo, JObject JsonObject, string URL, string toctoc, string Usar)
IniFile.EscribirINI(string Seccion, string Clave, string Valor)
gestorarchivos.MoverArchivo(string nombreArchivo, string rutaOrigen, string rutaDestino, string ext)
